revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:尼子氏]] [[commons:Category:Amago clan]] [[fa:Category:خاندان آماگو]] [[ko:Category:아마고씨]] [[pt:Category:Clã Amago]] [[ro:Category:Clanul Amago]] [[uk:Category:Амаґо]] [[zh:Category:尼子氏]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Amago clan]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8237486)
Bot: ensure Tier-2 tag (existing redirect target)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q8237486}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:尼子氏]] [[commons:Category:Amago clan]] [[fa:Category:خاندان آماگو]] [[ko:Category:아마고씨]] [[pt:Category:Clã Amago]] [[ro:Category:Clanul Amago]] [[uk:Category:Амаґо]] [[zh:Category:尼子氏]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Citation bot]], [[User:Immanuelle]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Amago_clan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
